cabin.type: Family Balcony Cabin with Suite Service
details: Double bed, sofa bed & fold-down bed — sleeps up to 5
Xbox 360 gaming console in the cabin
perks: Continental breakfast in bed (once per person per week)
Free pressing service for up to 3 items of clothing
Nespresso coffee machine, slippers, dressing gowns

hotel.name: TUI BLUE Sensatori Biomar
hotel.room: Select Junior Suite with Large Terrace

cabin.type: Balcony Junior Suite Cabin with Suite Service
details: Sleeps up to three people with two single beds that can combine into a queen-size bed, plus a sofa bed
En suite bathroom with shower and WC
Balcony of almost 13m² with table and chairs
Comfortable seating and upgraded cabin amenities
perks: Continental breakfast in bed per person per week
Free pressing service for up to three items during your stay
Coffee machine, slippers and dressing gown
Upgraded toiletries and choice of pillows
